THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILSENRATH, OLIVER HILSENRATH, HANA TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SHEPARD, MICHAEL J. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MIKE SHEPARD AND HELLER EHRMAN, L.L.P.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PENDING ARBITRATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE IS VALID AND ENFORCEABLE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT IT IS A CONTRACT OF ADHESION. IT APPEARS THAT MS. HILSENRATH DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO ASSERT CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND IF SHE DID, HER CLAIMS MAY BE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. IT ALSO APPEARS THAT HER CLAIMS ARE DERIVATIVE OF OLIVER HILSENRATH'S CLAIMS. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO STAY MS. HILSENRATH'S CLAIMS PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2008 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, RE: PROGRESS OF ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ethan Schulman, Esq. of Howard Rice, et al, 415-434-1600 for defendant and moving party Mike Shepard and heller Ehrman, LLP
Oliver and Hana Hilsenrath, 925-121-6299, plaintiffs and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANTS MIKE SHEPARD AND HELLER EHRMAN, L.L.P.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE IS VALID AND ENFORCEABLE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT IT IS A CONTRACT OF ADHESION. IT APPEARS THAT MS. HILSENRATH DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO ASSERT CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND IF SHE DID, HER CLAIMS MAY BE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. IT ALSO APPEARS THAT HER CLAIMS ARE DERIVATIVE OF OLIVER HILSENRATH'S CLAIMS. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO STAY MS. HILSENRATH'S CLAIMS PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/VC)
